high_consensus.description: Admin endpoint rate limiting + failed-auth throttling
Admin handler must write to BufferedAuditChain, not console.log
Deployment order needs per-step verification + rollback instructions
Standardize admin secret name/format (JWKS vs single key inconsistency)
Concrete ALB/WAF/SG controls for admin endpoint (not just 'should be internal')

blockers.concern: Admin secrets/JWKS design internally inconsistent across sections
Admin endpoint lacks concrete network and app-layer hardening
Per-request Redis GET without bounded fallback cache
Admin mode change not atomic with audit logging
x402 chain config footguns without startup validation
